rules.rule: every grounding record MUST cite at least one image_id and one grounded_target_id.
grounded_target_id MUST resolve to an existing procedural / troubleshooting / specification / warning / installation / operational target.
every grounding record MUST carry source evidence_ids and image provenance (source_uri or source_manifest).
trust_tier MUST be declared per image; OEM > certified-installer > field-reviewer > contributor.
probabilistic / similarity-derived bindings are FORBIDDEN — bindings are reviewer-declared only.
confidence_state ∈ {reviewer-approved, review-required, unresolved}; unresolved blocks publication-ready promotion.
synthesis_id MUST be present and resolve to an existing layer-41 synthesis manifest.
no silent rebinding: replacing an image_id requires append-only revision with prior_grounding_id.
reviewer attribution required on every grounding record.
